title: IT Intern (Web & Collaboration)
description: Developing LLM and RAG-based solutions within a regulated healthcare environment, contributing to AI infrastructure that supports real-world clinical and operational use cases. Applying responsible AI practices to ensure solutions meet governance, compliance, and data integrity requirements. Collaborating with cross-functional IT teams to design and implement AI-powered tools addressing operational challenges at scale.

title: AI Student (Work Integrated Learning Project)
description: Designed and trained a YOLO segmentation model (PyTorch/OpenCV) to detect hairline cracks on metallic surfaces, achieving 85%+ F1-score on industrial test data. Built a full-stack ML platform (React 18/Vite + FastAPI) with real-time training monitoring via WebSockets, live camera inference, multi-model switching, and automatic session resumption. Engineered a preprocessing pipeline over an annotated dataset of 11,273 images for production model deployment.

title: Coding Instructor
description: Taught programming fundamentals, logic, and debugging to 30+ students through hands-on game development projects. Designed structured coding exercises that reinforce algorithms, computational thinking, and software development best practices. Mentored students in project-based environments, strengthening communication and technical leadership skills.

title: Data Analyst (Co-op)
description: Analyzed complex financial datasets using SQL, Excel, and Power BI to uncover performance trends and support executive decision-making. Built automated Power BI dashboards for real-time KPI monitoring, reducing manual reporting workload and improving reporting efficiency by 20%. Improved data integrity across HR, Finance, and IT systems, reducing reporting discrepancies by 15%.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Developed predictive machine learning models in Python to forecast energy demand and customer behavior, enhancing operational planning accuracy. Built interactive dashboards in Power BI and Tableau to visualize KPIs and business metrics for leadership teams. Automated recurring reporting pipelines using Python and SQL, reducing manual processing time by 20%.
